pageContext.name: Bettie Page: Carousel
pageContext.description: Sideshow Art Prints and Ozone Productions present the Bettie Page: Carousel Fine Art Print, a fantastical pinup art collectible by the renowned artist Olivia De Berardinis.  Feeling nauti? Pinup pioneer Bettie Page is one of Olivia's most iconic and often-painted subjects, appearing in all sorts of scenarios and ensembles across the artist's prolific portfolio. In this bubbly portrait, Page sits side-saddle on a colorful seahorse — as a mermaid! The marine scene features a bubblegum pink-and-blue palette, contrasting perfectly with the model's black scales and body harness. A small octopus accents Bettie Page's flowing hair and a pink riding crop rests gently in her hand.  Officially licensed and created for Olivia's 2023 art calendar, this dazzling composition is now available for fans as a high-end collectible. Presented as an unframed giclée with hand-torn edges or in a custom framed format, this pinup art print is a high-fidelity recreation of Olivia's original acrylic on wood painting. Each Bettie Page: Carousel Fine Art Print is hand-signed by Olivia herself and includes her official embossed Seal of Authenticity and a signed Certificate of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of only 150 pieces.  If you like what you sea, make a splash in your collection with the Bettie Page: Carousel Fine Art Print by Olivia De Berardinis!
